memberdef.argsstring: (self, bytes local_peer_id, Optional[Callable[[bytes, bytes, str], Awaitable[bytes]]] network_send_func=None, int k_size=K)
memberdef.name: __init__

para.verbatim:
Initialize Kademlia DHT.
Args: local_peer_id: Local peer's ID (32 bytes) network_send_func: Async function to send DHT messages (target_peer_id, message_bytes, protocol_id) -> response k_size: Bucket size parameter (default 20)

Find a peer by ID.
First checks local routing table, then performs iterative lookup.
Args: peer_id: Peer ID to find (32 bytes)
Returns: Peer info if found, None otherwise

Announce that we provide a content.
Args: cid: Content ID (CID) announce: Whether to announce to network
Returns: True if successful

Find providers for a content.
Args: cid: Content ID (CID) count: Maximum number of providers to return
Returns: List of provider peers

Store a key-value pair in DHT.
Args: key: Key to store under value: Value to store
Returns: True if successful

Retrieve a value from DHT.
Args: key: Key to retrieve
Returns: Value if found, None otherwise

Handle incoming DHT message.
Args: peer_id: Sender's peer ID message: Raw message bytes
Returns: Response message bytes

Add a bootstrap peer to routing table.
Args: peer_id: Bootstrap peer's ID addresses: List of multiaddresses
Get number of peers in routing table.

memberdef.argsstring: (self, bytes peer_id, bytes key, bytes provider_id)
memberdef.name: _announce_provider

para.verbatim: Announce a provider to a peer.

Kademlia DHT implementation.
Implements the full Kademlia DHT protocol including: - Node discovery (find_peer) - Content routing (provide, find_providers) - Key-value storage (put_value, get_value)
